calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Compel Responses To Defts Special Interrogatories (Set One) Defts Form Interrogatories;
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Miguel Soto, Esq., 408.833.5456, for defendant Mary Guzman; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARY GUZMAN'S Motion To Compel Responses To Defendant's Special Interrogatories (Set One) Defendant's Form Interrogatories and defendants requests for production of documents (set one) is granted; no opposition filed. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the amount of $858. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

Mtn To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: marie appel, esq., 415.782.8984, for defendant mary guzman; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARY GUZMAN's Motion To Set Aside Default is granted, for good cause shown, pursuant to CCP 473(b). No opposition was filed. The moving party shall respond to the Complaint within 10 days after entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
